TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pinaski, title = Pinaski, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pinaski} }

S.FORM: Pinaski Itiniay i Beinan Cen no Taitung ko Pinaski a niyaro', 232 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 670 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 50% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 337 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 50% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 333 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Puyuma 36%, Amis 4%, Paiwan 3%, Bunun 2%, Rukai 1%, roma 4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: pinaski itiniaj i b~b~vəinan ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u pinaski a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u po~u~ujo~u~uma **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~u~ukai *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Pinaski Itiniay i Beinan Cen no Taitung ko Pinaski a niyaro', 232 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 670 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 50% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 337 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 50% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 333 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Puyuma 36%, Amis 4%, Paiwan 3%, Bunun 2%, Rukai 1%, roma 4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: pinaski itiniaj i b~b~vəinan ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u pinaski a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u po~u~ujo~u~uma **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~u~ukai *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
